name: @mancioshell/pi-board-agent
description_en: Autonomous GitHub Project (v2) board executor for Pi — picks Ready cards, implements them in parallel git worktrees via pi-dynamic-workflows, and opens one PR per plan.
description_zh: Pi 的 GitHub 项目(v2)看板自主执行器 — 选取 Ready 卡片，通过 pi-dynamic-workflows 在并行 git worktrees 中实现，并为每个计划打开一个 PR。
